subcodes.first_line: O ye two who are assured in God! Give thanks unto the Lord that ye are the objects of His gracious regard and are blessed with His heavenly bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو موقن بالله شکر کنید خدا را که منظور نظر عنایتید و موفق بموهبت حضرت
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual springtime
